pageContext.name: Joséphine Baker: Folies Bergère
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints and Ozone Productions present the Joséphine Baker: Folies Bergère Fine Art Print by renowned pinup artist Olivia De Berardinis.  Josephine Baker has been one of Olivia's biggest artistic inspirations for over 30 years, but the beloved entertainer and activist has a global legacy over a century long! Lively and sensational, this star of the Folies Bergère shines in a dazzling original work that shows her dancing in a yellow feathered costume. The image is packed with vibrant motion, as detailed brush strokes show Baker's enchanting movements against the black background. From her charming smile to her expressive performance, it's not hard to see why Baker became one of the most celebrated headliners of the famed music hall and a symbol of the Roaring Twenties.  Each officially licensed Joséphine Baker: Folies Bergère Fine Art Print is hand-signed by Olivia herself and includes her official embossed Seal of Authenticity along with a signed Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of only 150 pieces. This faithful reproduction of Olivia's original acrylic on wood painting is available to pinup art collectors as an unframed giclée with hand-torn edges or in a custom framed format, making this a must-have tribute to an international icon of the Jazz Age.  Bring the cabaret home to your collection with the Joséphine Baker: Folies Bergère Fine Art Print by Olivia De Berardinis!
